sentences.sentence: Vehicle keys are kept behind the counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (keys, kept, behind)

sentences.sentence: Insurance documents are printed automatically with every contract.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in automatically; consonant cluster -nts in documents

sentences.sentence: We can upgrade your compact car at the main desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster -ct in compact; reduced syllable in upgrade

sentences.sentence: Comfortable rental options are listed on the wall behind me.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in comfortable; consonant cluster in listed

sentences.sentence: Fuel receipts are collected when you return the vehicle.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster -pts in receipts; linking collected_when

sentences.sentence: Maps and parking permits are available near the exit.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters -mps in permits and parking; linking maps_and

sentences.sentence: If you are unsure about the route to your hotel, check the printed map for nearby parking areas.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: conditional intonation; reduced function words to_your, about_the

sentences.sentence: Trays are stacked beside the sink.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (trays, stacked, sink)

sentences.sentence: Keep the door closed during printing.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster -sed in closed; linking keep_the

sentences.sentence: Chemical baths are mixed automatically every morning.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in automatically; consonant cluster -ths in baths

sentences.sentence: You can develop your prints at the second station.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster -nts in prints; linking develop_your

sentences.sentence: Safelights are switched on before the lights go down.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters -lts in lights; linking switched_on

sentences.sentence: Drying racks and clips are stored on the lower shelf.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters in racks, clips; reduced syllable in drying

sentences.sentence: Before you leave for the day, check the posted schedule for open enlarger slots and supply hours.
sentences.structure: fronted temporal clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: final clusters -ges to, -lots; reduced function words for_the, for_open

sentences.sentence: Scripts are placed on the front table.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster -pts in scripts; linking placed_on

sentences.sentence: The stage lights turn on here.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun stage lights; linking turn_on

sentences.sentence: Please find your mark before we begin.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking find_your; clear word-final consonants (mark, begin)

sentences.sentence: Costume fittings are scheduled in the back room.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress in compound nouns costume fittings, back room; linking scheduled_in

sentences.sentence: We can run through the opening scene one more time.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking run_through; stress placement in opening scene

sentences.sentence: Sound cues are included in the rehearsal notes.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking cues_are, is_included pattern; compound noun rehearsal notes

sentences.sentence: If you forget your entrance, check the call sheet posted by the door for your scene assignments.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: conditional intonation; final clusters -nts in assignments; reduced function words for_your
